name: Citizen
description: The ordinary people of the galaxy — factory workers, office workers, colonists and the like.

corporate.name: Corporate
corporate.description: You work for a large interstellar company.

worker.name: Worker
worker.description: You toil in the factories, fields, or mines.

colonist.name: Colonist
colonist.description: You are settling a new world for the Imperium.

mishaps.1: Severely injured (treat as a result of 2 on the Injury Table). Alternatively, roll twice on the Injury Table and take the lower result.
mishaps.2: You are unjustly accused of an offence against the company or colony and discharged. Gain a Rival.
mishaps.3: Mental illness or an addiction brought on by your circumstances forces you out. Reduce your INT or SOC by 1.
mishaps.4: A business deal, crop, or project fails disastrously and you are fired or bankrupted. Lose any Benefit rolls from this term.
mishaps.5: You make an Enemy of a co-worker, customer, or rival who forces you out of your position.
mishaps.6: Injured. Roll on the Injury Table.

events.2: Disaster! Roll on the Mishap Table, but you are not ejected from this career.
events.3: You are given additional duties outside your normal role. Gain any one Service Skill at level 1.
events.4: You clash with a rival co-worker or competitor. Gain a Rival and increase any one skill you already have by one level.
events.5: You strike up a friendship that helps you in your work. Gain a Contact and DM+1 to any one Benefit roll.
events.6: You are given advanced training. Roll EDU 8+ to increase any one skill you already have by one level.
events.7: Life Event. Roll on the Life Events Table.
events.8: You are sent on an extended assignment, workshop or colonisation effort. Gain one of Admin 1, Profession 1, Steward 1 or Survival 1.
events.9: You put in extra hours or take on a second job. Gain DM+2 to one Advancement roll this term, but DM-2 to your Survival roll this term.
events.10: You are singled out for your exemplary work. Gain DM+2 to your next Advancement roll or a +1 DM to any one Benefit roll.
events.11: You are given specialist training. Gain one level in any Service Skill of your choice, or transfer to any other non-military career (without a Qualification roll).
events.12: You strike it rich, invent something useful, or receive a windfall. You are automatically promoted and gain DM+2 to any one Benefit roll.
